hooks.description: HSEOS SWARM gate (canonical handler): model routing guard (executor declara sonnet; Opus só com opt-in estratégico) + skill-check advisory + gate dev-squad bloqueante sem run ativo
Recommend skills before Agent spawn based on SKILL.md frontmatter triggers
ADO-first gate: warns when Agent dev-squad dispatch has no ADO mapping in PLAN.md. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
Block direct writes/edits to CLAUDE.md; route durable agent rules to AGENTS.md
Backup file before any Edit operation

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND" | grep -qE '^(git push|git reset --hard|rm -rf|git branch -[Dd])'; then echo '[HSEOS] High-risk command intercepted — confirm this is intentional' >&2; fi
hooks.description: Warn on high-risk bash commands
ADO branch guard: blocks direct git push to trunk branches (main/master/develop/trunk/staging/hmg). Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
Block raw search when a code index (axon, etc.) is available; pluggable across providers

hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v black &>/dev/null; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif [[ "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]] && command -v prettier &>/dev/null; then prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
hooks.description: Auto-format Python (black) and JS/TS (prettier) after Edit
Emit agent-state tool_call event (best-effort, non-blocking)
Opt-in OTLP metrics export (TEE of tool events). Self-suppresses unless OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set. SQLite remains canonical.
Lint plan files for missing Execution Protocol section in parallel-flow plans
Trigger index reindex after edits; pluggable across code-index providers
ADO plan advisory: warns when PLAN.md or MASTER-PLAN.md is written without ADO mapping annotations. Non-blocking. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
ADO task progress: adds comment to ADO Task and transitions to Active on git commit in ado-{ID}-* branches. Best-effort, never blocks. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
ADO PR link: links GitHub PR to ADO Story after gh pr create. Extracts PR URL from output. Best-effort, never blocks. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
ADO tag close: emits inbox event when git tag pushed. ATLAS processes inbox via /atlas close to close ADO Feature/Epic. Never calls ADO directly. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.

hooks.command: echo '--- HSEOS SESSION START ---' && echo 'Constitution: .enterprise/.specs/constitution/Enterprise-Constitution.md' && echo 'Skills: .enterprise/governance/agent-skills/SKILLS-REGISTRY.md' && echo 'Agents: .hseos/AGENT-MANIFEST.md' && echo 'Branch:' $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown') && echo '--- READ CLAUDE.md BEFORE ANY ACTION ---'
hooks.description: Display HSEOS navigation reminder at session start
Emit agent-state start event (best-effort, non-blocking)
ADO inbox check: warns at session start if pending tag-close events exist in .hseos/runs/ado-ops/inbox/. Advisory only — directs user to run /atlas close. Exits silently when ado.enabled=false.
Emit agent-state complete event when Claude session ends (best-effort, non-blocking)
Opt-in OTLP/Loki session-ended log export. Self-suppresses unless OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT or HSEOS_LOKI_ENDPOINT is set.
Snapshot critical context (next steps, open questions) before compaction
Project-scoped prompt logging and state injection (vault concerns stripped vs upstream)
Session-end log; vault sync only when second_brain.enabled true
System notification for long-running operations (cross-platform — toast/bell)
